1.solution: |x¬≤‚ąí7x+6|‚Č§6 (not hold ‚Üí ‚Č§). Right: x¬≤‚ąí7x‚Č§0‚Üíx(x‚ąí7)‚Č§0‚Üí0‚Č§x‚Č§7. Left: x¬≤‚ąí7x+12‚Č•0‚Üí(x‚ąí3)(x‚ąí4)‚Č•0‚Üíx‚Č§3 or x‚Č•4. Combined: [0,3]‚ą™[4,7]. Integers: {0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7}=8 values.

2.solution: (a+b)(1/a+1/b)=1+b/a+a/b+1=2+a/b+b/a. By AM-GM (ab>0 ensures same sign): a/b+b/a‚Č•2. So expression‚Č•4. Equality when a=b. Minimum=4 ‚Üí always ‚Č•4. Answer: D.

3.solution: Assume a‚Č•0. From cond(2): b+c>‚ąí1‚ąía. From cond(3): 3b+c<‚ąí4‚ąí9a. Subtract: 2b<‚ąí3‚ąí8a‚Č§‚ąí3‚Üíb<‚ąí3/2. From cond(1)‚ąícond(2): ‚ąí2b<2‚Üíb>‚ąí1. Contradiction: b<‚ąí3/2 and b>‚ąí1. So a<0. Answer: B (Negative).

4.solution: Let u=x^(1/3) (defined for all real x). x^(2/3)+x^(1/3)‚ąí2=u¬≤+u‚ąí2=(u+2)(u‚ąí1)‚Č§0‚Üí‚ąí2‚Č§u‚Č§1. Cube: (‚ąí2)¬≥‚Č§x‚Č§1¬≥‚Üí‚ąí8‚Č§x‚Č§1. Answer: A.

5.solution: (1/2)^A>16=(1/2)^{‚ąí4} requires A<‚ąí4. Domain: 4‚ąí|x|‚Č†0. For ‚ąí4<x<4: A=|x+4|/(4‚ąí|x|)‚Č•0>‚ąí4, no solution. For x>4: A=(x+4)/(4‚ąíx)<‚ąí4‚Üíx+4>4x‚ąí16‚Üíx<20/3. Solution: 4<x<20/3‚Čą6.67. Integers: {5,6}=2.

6.solution: Factor: x¬≥‚ąí6x¬≤+11x‚ąí6=(x‚ąí1)(x‚ąí2)(x‚ąí3). Expression=(x‚ąí1)(x‚ąí2)(x‚ąí3)/(x‚ąí4)<0. Sign analysis: <0 on (1,2)‚ą™(3,4). No integers lie strictly between 1&2 or 3&4. Integral values=0.

7.solution: Let t=‚ąön. Numerator: t‚Āī+2t¬≥+8t+16=(t+2)¬≤(t¬≤‚ąí2t+4). Denominator: t¬≤+4t+4=(t+2)¬≤. So x=t¬≤‚ąí2t+4=(t‚ąí1)¬≤+3. For 36‚Č§n‚Č§72: t‚ąą[6,6‚ąö2]. x is increasing: min=(6‚ąí1)¬≤+3=28; max=(6‚ąö2‚ąí1)¬≤+3=76‚ąí12‚ąö2‚Čą59. Range‚äā[28,60]. Answer: D.

8.solution: For quadratic>0 for all x: disc<0. Disc=4(4k‚ąí1)¬≤‚ąí4(15k¬≤‚ąí2k‚ąí7)<0‚Üí(4k‚ąí1)¬≤‚ąí(15k¬≤‚ąí2k‚ąí7)<0‚Üík¬≤‚ąí6k+8<0‚Üí(k‚ąí2)(k‚ąí4)<0‚Üí2<k<4. Only integer: k=3.

9.solution: f(n)=n¬≥‚ąí7n¬≤+11n‚ąí5=(n‚ąí1)¬≤(n‚ąí5). f(n)>0 iff n>5 (since (n‚ąí1)¬≤>0 for n‚Č†1 and n‚ąí5>0). Smallest positive integer where f(n)>0 is n=6. Not among options {4,5,8}. Answer: B (None of these).

10.solution: 6561=3^8. Express as p^(q^r): try p=3,q=2,r=3: q^r=2^3=8, p^(q^r)=3^8=6561‚úď. Sum=3+2+3=8. Check smaller: sum=7 needs q^r=8 with other p,q,r but no solution gives 6561. Minimum=8. Answer: B.
